underlying_goal: Migrate important configuration and data from the global ~/.claude/ folder into a version-controlled ~/claude/ project folder, using symlinks for non-critical/empty directories
friction_detail: Claude immediately started brute-force exploring files without thinking or consulting context first, and the user had to interrupt and redirect.
brief_summary: User wanted to plan migration of important files from ~/.claude/ to ~/claude/ with symlinks; after initial friction from Claude's brute-force approach, they aligned on a strategy but the session ended before implementation.
